titleStmt.title: SII 26.515: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 515. (A.R. No. 488 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same verandah.
This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records the order of the king confirming the grant of land as tax-free dēvadāna given by his uncle (ammāṉ) Toṇḍaimāṉār, to the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Uttāmaśōḻapuram in Āṇmā-nāḍu. The land was situated in the same place and it was given to the temple from the month of Paṅguṉi of the 7th year in the reign of the king. It mentions the temple of the god Uttamśōḻaviṇṇagararemperumāṉār of the same place.
The signatories were Tirambaiyūruḍaiyāṉ and Vīrapāṇḍya Pallavaraiyaṉ and another whose name is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanacakravatti ṉ Āṇmānāṭṭu Uttamacoḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku nāṉātecikkuṭpaṭṭa panṟil Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakarremperumāṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam [ vikramapāṇṭiya] caturvvetimaṅkalattukku paḻaiyakalveṭṭiyapaṭi nattamum samasta prāptikaḷu nāṉ tiruviruppum
tiruvitiyumāy Aṉupavittupponta tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāy Uḷḷa paṟṟum taṅkaḷur nattattil Innāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāy Uḷḷa paṟṟu Araca nārāyaṇaṉperunteruvukku Ittoṭṭakkūṟukaḷukku nāṉkellaiyilum nāṭṭiṉa tiruvāḻikkallukkuṭpaṭṭa nattamum toṭṭamum palanāyamāṉa tevatāṉan tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamum taṉ(ṉ)matāṉa Iṟaiyilikaḷum paṟṟil Ivvemperumāṉārkkum tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamākak kuṭutta Ivvūr paṟṟil vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭai
yanāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa potu tiruvi ṟkkil Āka ttāril mālai Eṉkiṟavaṉ maṉaikku meṟku nāṭṭiṉa kallukku kiḻakkum Itaṉ cevvaikku meṟkum kiḻai tiruvitiyākavum teṟku tiruvitikku kaṇṇuṭaipperunteruvil Āṇṭa piḷḷaimaṉaikku vaṭakku nāṭṭiṉa kallukku kiḻai mel poṉa cevvaikku vaṭakku maṭamum maṉaiyum nikkik kuṭutta mattamum nikki niṉṟa nattamum nattappārun toṭṭamum toṭṭakkollaikaḷum kuḷamum kuḷapparippum naṉceyu puṉceyum maramum kiṇaṟum (maṟṟum)
maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭīśvara- muṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku Ammāṉ toṇṭaimāṉār Ittāl Eḻāvatu paṅkuṉi mātam mutal kuṭiniṅkātevatāṉamāka tantu Ippaṟṟu pacāṉam ciṟukoṭaiyāṉa vayira puṉpayir maṟṟum tāṉ veṇṭum payir ceytukoḷḷa Ittāl varum kaṭamai yiraṇṭupokam Antarāyam veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantivikkirakam vācal viṉiyokam kāriyavārāṭci Ilāñciṉaippeṟu nattappaccai piḷḷaiyārnompitevai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti
kāltevai viṭṭuttevai Ivai taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappāṭṭam tippāṭṭam maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittum Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa Innāḷ mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka tantu variilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkacoṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakoṇṭu veṇṭummiṭaṅkaḷil tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka § Ivai tirampaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai virapāṇṭiya pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu jarāyaṇeṇa �
Digital edition of SII 26.515 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
